summary: Tested new features: Cinema Productions logo in sidebar, GTQ as default currency, PDF download buttons per row in reservations list, PDF download in reservation detail, Settings page currency order, and export APIs.

features_tested.logo_sidebar: PASS - img[src='/logo.png'] with alt='Cinema Productions' visible in desktop sidebar
features_tested.gtq_currency_reservations: PASS - Amounts show 'Q 5,222', 'Q 20,000', 'Q 50,000' with Q symbol
features_tested.gtq_currency_detail: PASS - Detail page shows Q 50,000 / Q 10,000 / Q 40,000
features_tested.pdf_btn_per_row: PASS - 3 PDF buttons (data-testid=pdf-btn-{id}) visible in reservations table (3 rows = 3 buttons)
features_tested.pdf_toast_list: PASS - Clicking PDF button in list shows 'PDF generado exitosamente' toast
features_tested.download_pdf_btn_detail: PASS - data-testid=download-pdf-btn found and clickable in detail page, shows 'PDF descargado' toast
features_tested.settings_gtq_first: PASS - GTQ is first currency button and shown as active (purple) in settings
features_tested.settings_gtq_label: PASS - GTQ button shows 'Q GTQ / Quetzal Guatemalteco'
features_tested.export_csv_api: PASS - /api/export/reservations?format=csv returns CSV with correct headers: id, client_name, event_type, event_date, total_amount, advance_paid, status etc.
features_tested.export_json_api: PASS - /api/export/reservations?format=json returns JSON array with 3 records

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully working: Logo (Cinema Productions, /logo.png) in sidebar, GTQ (Q) as default currency, PDF download buttons per row with data-testid=pdf-btn-{id}, PDF button in detail page with data-testid=download-pdf-btn. Detail page PDF toast says 'PDF descargado' (not 'PDF generado exitosamente' - slight variation but working). Settings page shows GTQ as first/active currency.
